derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: Stock options granted pursuant to the reporting person's employment agreement.  Pursuant to that employment agreement, the reporting person was entitled to receive a total of 41,621 stock options. In error, the Issuer previously granted only 41,412. This grant was made solely to correct the error in the number of stock options granted under the reporting person's employment agreement. [F1]

footnotes.F1: Stock options granted pursuant to the reporting person's employment agreement.  Pursuant to that employment agreement, the reporting person was entitled to receive a total of 41,621 stock options. In error, the Issuer previously granted only 41,412. This grant was made solely to correct the error in the number of stock options granted under the reporting person's employment agreement.
